title: Academy content
description: Frontmatter contract for an academy.conduction.nl entry. Each MDX file under sites/academy/content/ has frontmatter that conforms to this schema. Translations live in sites/academy/i18n/<locale>/docusaurus-plugin-content-blog/ and conform to the same schema, with content allowed to diverge per language.

slug.description: URL slug. Optional; Docusaurus derives from filename when omitted. Translations of the same post must share the same slug so URLs match across locales.

title.description: Sentence-case title. Used as the card title and the h1 on the detail page.

contentType.description: Single-pick content type. Drives the chip colour and the filter row on the landing.

authors.description: Author keys. Resolved against sites/academy/content/authors.yml. Multiple authors render as 'A & B' in bylines.

date.description: Publish date in ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for sort order and the byline.

tags.description: Topical tags shown next to the content-type chip. Free-form for now; can be promoted to a controlled vocabulary later.

heroImage.description: Path to the hero image used in <ContentDetailHero/>. Relative to the post folder.

summary.description: One-line summary. Shown under the title on cards and as the lede on the detail page. Keep under 160 characters.

durationMinutes.description: Read or watch time in minutes. Renders as 'N min read' (blog/guide/case-study/tutorial) or 'N min watch' (webinar).

videoUrl.description: Webinar video URL. Required for contentType=webinar; ignored elsewhere.

thumbnailTone.description: Optional tone override for the card thumbnail panel. Defaults are derived from contentType so editors normally do not set this.
